svg.text: Numbers — allocating, mixed inputs — lower is better
human_format f64 only, precision=2, returns String
Numbers — allocating, u64 inputs (apples-to-apples) — lower is better
human_format u64 as f64, precision=2, returns String
human_format u64 as f64, precision=1, returns String
Numbers — allocating, f64 inputs — lower is better
Numbers — humfmt option coverage (allocating) — lower is better
Numbers — extended u128 range (humfmt only) — lower is better
Numbers — reused buffer (write!) — lower is better
numfmt u64, short scale, precision=2, push_str (returns &str)
human_format u64 as f64, precision=2, push_str (always allocs)
Numbers — reused buffer, humfmt option coverage — lower is better
